doctor_description: Clustered solid nodules in LLL tree-in-bud pattern, decreased in size
validator_description: Clustered centrilobular nodules LLL tree-in-bud pattern, decreased — sequelae of known coccidioidomycosis
management_impact: None — same clinical conclusion, minor descriptor difference (solid vs centrilobular)
notes: Doctor labels nodules 'solid'; validator specifies 'centrilobular'. Same interpretation. No management difference.

doctor_description: Stable solid/partially calcified nodules — per Fleischner 2017, no further follow-up
validator_description: Stable solid/calcified nodules — per Fleischner 2017, no further follow-up
management_impact: None
notes: Concordant — both state no follow-up per Fleischner 2017. Measure 364 satisfied.

doctor_description: Decreased vertebral body density T11-L2 (not below 100 HU) — osteopenia
validator_description: Vertebral body density: T11 148 HU, T12 129 HU, L1 101 HU, L2 100 HU — osteopenia
management_impact: None — same diagnosis, validator gives specific HU values vs doctor's range
notes: Minor stylistic difference in reporting density. Same clinical conclusion.

doctor_description: Thyroid heterogeneous, largest left lobe 2.9×2.7cm with superior mediastinal extension — thyroid US recommended per ACR 2014
validator_description: Thyroid heterogeneous nodules, largest left 2.9×2.7cm (no change) — thyroid US recommended if not already obtained
management_impact: None — both recommend thyroid US for 2.9cm nodule
notes: Concordant. 2.9cm thyroid nodule appropriately prompts US recommendation in both reports.

finding_category: RLL nodule — perifissural vs solid characterization
doctor_description: Solid nodule 7mm along fissure (image 119, no change) — included in conditional Fleischner: CT 12 months if high-risk
validator_description: Perifissural node 7mm (image 119, no change) — no follow-up required per Fleischner
management_impact: Doctor may trigger unnecessary CT follow-up for what validator confirms is a perifissural node requiring no follow-up
notes: Doctor fails to characterize as perifissural; includes in conditional Fleischner protocol. Validator correctly identifies perifissural LN — no follow-up needed per Fleischner 2017.

doctor_description: Solid subpleural nodule 5mm (image 118, no change)
management_impact: No management change — minor overcall not confirmed by validator
notes: Doctor documents LLL 5mm nodule not seen by validator. No management impact.

validator_description: Solid nodule 3mm (image 73, no change)
management_impact: No management change — 3mm nodule requires no follow-up per Fleischner
notes: Doctor misses LUL 3mm nodule. Clinically insignificant omission.

doctor_description: No cardiomegaly
validator_description: Cardiomegaly, cardiothoracic ratio 0.57
management_impact: No independent management change — PA dilation and pericardial effusion already trigger cardiac evaluation; cardiomegaly should be documented
notes: Doctor explicitly states no cardiomegaly; validator reports CTR 0.57 (cardiomegaly).

validator_description: Right subclavian artery aneurysmal dilation 2.9cm (unchanged) — primary impression finding #1
management_impact: Doctor completely misses 2.9cm subclavian artery aneurysm. Requires vascular surgery referral and follow-up imaging.
notes: Critical miss: aneurysmal subclavian artery is the #1 impression finding per validator. Doctor makes no mention of this vascular finding.

doctor_description: Mild CAC with PCP referral recommendation
validator_description: Mild CAC with PCP referral recommendation
management_impact: None — ACRad44 satisfied by both
notes: Concordant. Both document mild CAC with PCP referral.

doctor_description: Calcified nodules RUL (4mm, 3mm) and LUL micronodule 2mm — no CT follow-up per Fleischner 2017
validator_description: Calcified nodules RUL (4mm, 3mm) and LUL micronodule 2mm — healed granulomas, no CT follow-up per Fleischner 2017
management_impact: None — Measure 364 satisfied
notes: Concordant. Both agree on calcified nodules with no follow-up.

validator_description: Thickening of walls of segmental and subsegmental bronchi
management_impact: No management change — incidental finding consistent with bronchitis
notes: Doctor omits bronchial wall thickening noted by validator. Clinically insignificant omission.

doctor_description: Pericardial effusion 9mm
validator_description: No significant pericardial effusion identified (pulsation artifact near LAD noted)
management_impact: No management change — minimal overcall, validator explicitly notes no significant effusion
notes: Doctor overcalls pericardial effusion at 9mm; validator attributes appearance to pulsation artifact. No management impact.

doctor_description: Mild coronary calcification with PCP referral
validator_description: Likely mild coronary calcification with PCP referral
management_impact: None — ACRad44 satisfied
notes: Concordant. Both satisfy ACRad44.

anatomical_location: Left common carotid artery, abdominal aorta
validator_description: Mild wall calcification of left common carotid artery and abdominal aorta
management_impact: No management change — incidental atherosclerosis, no actionable consequence
notes: Validator documents carotid and abdominal aortic atherosclerosis; doctor omits.

doctor_description: Bone lucency xiphoid process 4mm — Bone-RADS 3, CT follow-up 6 months
validator_description: Sternal foramen — clinically insignificant developmental variant
management_impact: Doctor assigns Bone-RADS 3 and triggers CT follow-up 6 months for what validator identifies as a developmental sternal foramen
notes: Doctor overcalls developmental variant as indeterminate bone lesion requiring follow-up. Validator correctly identifies sternal foramen.

doctor_description: Left adrenal thickening 9mm — per ACR White Paper 2017, CT follow-up not required
management_impact: No management change — doctor documents but correctly applies no follow-up; validator does not mention
notes: Doctor documents adrenal thickening but correctly manages it with no follow-up. Validator unremarkable. No impact.

doctor_description: Nodular structure inferior left thyroid lobe 1.9×1.3cm — unclear etiology, correlate with US
management_impact: Doctor triggers thyroid US for 1.9cm thyroid nodule not confirmed or mentioned by validator
notes: Validator does not mention thyroid. Doctor documents 1.9cm nodule requiring US. Finding is plausible but unconfirmed by validator.

doctor_description: Perifissural LN 6mm along fissure — no CT follow-up per Fleischner 2017
validator_description: Perifissural node 6mm (image 107, no change) — no follow-up required
management_impact: None — Measure 364 satisfied
notes: Concordant. Both agree on perifissural node with no follow-up.

doctor_description: Subpleural GGO areas bilateral lower lobes, increased — inflammatory changes
validator_description: Atelectasis/GGO areas supradiaphragmatic and lung bases, increased — may correspond to interstitial changes/scarring
management_impact: No immediate management change — both note increased opacities; interstitial framing vs inflammatory may affect clinical interpretation
notes: Etiologic characterization differs — inflammatory vs interstitial/scarring. Neither triggers urgent management.

validator_description: Enlargement of the ventricles
management_impact: No immediate additional management change — context of severe CAC and coronary stent; should be documented
notes: Validator documents ventricular enlargement; doctor omits. Incidental in context of atherosclerotic heart disease.

validator_description: Fatty inclusions of the myocardium of the ventricles — may correspond to consequence of atherosclerotic heart disease
management_impact: No management change — incidental in context of known atherosclerotic heart disease
notes: Validator documents fatty myocardial inclusions; doctor omits. No independent management impact.

doctor_description: RML solid nodule 6mm — CT follow-up 12 months
validator_description: RML solid nodule 6mm — Fleischner: CT follow-up 6-12 months, if stable CT 18-24 months
management_impact: Minor — doctor interval (12 months) is at the outer edge; validator provides complete protocol including subsequent 18-24 month step
notes: Both call for follow-up CT. Doctor's 12-month interval acceptable but misses 6-month window and subsequent step. Measure 364 partially satisfied.

validator_description: Multiple bilateral micronodules 1-2mm, mostly subpleural/centrilobular — may be inflammatory/respiratory bronchiolitis
management_impact: No management change — 1-2mm micronodules not actionable
notes: Validator documents bilateral micronodules; doctor omits. No clinical impact.

doctor_description: Mild emphysema — no LDCT recommendation
validator_description: Mild emphysema — emphysema = independent lung cancer risk factor; consider LDCT screening
management_impact: Doctor omits LDCT recommendation for patient with emphysema who is a current smoker >40 years. QMM23 not satisfied.
notes: Patient is current smoker >40 years per indication. Doctor documents emphysema but omits LDCT recommendation. QMM23 MIPS violation.

doctor_description: Severe CAC documented — no PCP referral recommendation in impression
validator_description: Severe CAC with PCP referral recommendation
management_impact: Doctor fails to include PCP referral for severe CAC. ACRad44 not satisfied.
notes: Doctor documents severe CAC but omits required PCP referral. Validator satisfies ACRad44. MIPS violation.

doctor_description: Left adrenal lesions (4 HU, -46 HU) — CT follow-up 12 months recommended
validator_description: Left adrenal adenoma 1.3cm -1 HU — benign adenoma, no imaging follow-up; consider biochemical evaluation
management_impact: Doctor incorrectly recommends CT follow-up for lipid-rich adrenal adenoma. Measure 405 — no imaging follow-up needed. Unnecessary CT triggered.
notes: Lipid-rich adrenal adenoma (<10 HU) does not require imaging follow-up per Measure 405. Doctor recommends CT at 12 months. MIPS 405 violation.

finding_category: Left renal collecting system — pyelectasis vs sinus cyst
doctor_description: Left renal pelvis dilated 1.7cm (no calyceal dilation) — renal US recommended
validator_description: Left renal sinus cyst 1.7cm
management_impact: Doctor characterizes as pyelectasis and triggers renal US; validator characterizes as sinus cyst (benign, no implied follow-up)
notes: Pyelectasis vs renal sinus cyst — different diagnoses for same 1.7cm structure. Doctor triggers US; validator does not.
